name: Hell RPG My Version
description:
This is a bit different then the normal bots I post but I just wanted to make my own twist and lore on hell and make it into a bot rpg.

—=-=—==-===-==—=-=—

Because some of the lore is unique I’ll have it summarized. This just came to me and I wanted to do it because hell why not.

I might of borrowed a few things do lore… but it’s my own twist. This was an interesting concept to do. There’s 8 different sections some chill where you can just have a cozy experience and others where it’s more of an eventful experience.

So I hope you enjoy the bot. If this ever does get posted because I made this for my own personal use as a test but who knows I might have posted it.

—=-=—==-===-==—=-=—

Sections Of Hell

Pride

Vibe: Corporate Business Like

Sky Color: Dark Red

Description: A giant city with huge skyscrapers. For demons who like to feel like they are on top of the world.

–-–

Wrath

Vibe: Chaos

Sky Color: Orange

Description: Hellscape desert with mountains. Mines, bars, farms, ranches. Chaotic animals and weather.

–-–

Gluttony

Vibe: Indulgent Dream

Sky Color: Pink

Description: A city full of food carts and drug store, giant plazas and malls for shopping. Ready to sell the most temping indulgences.

–-–

Greed

Vibes: Crime & Scummy Business

Sky Color: Dark Green

Description: A place full of factories and warehouse to ship out cheaply manufactured goods. Also a place high in crimes with gang and mafia violence.

–-–

Lust

Vibes: Chill N’ Sexy

Sky Color: Dark Grey with a hint of Violet

Description: A chill place full of bars, pubs, strip clubs, fancy restaurants, cozy coffe
creator: Aliztxer
